title: McTool++
description: Add 31 New thing and some useful tools
body:
A NEW VERSION WAS UPLOADED

I'll upload the fabric version

I Fix lots of bug and delete much useless thing 

I know v2.5.2 and v2.0.7 have lots of bugs and it like shit lol

So v2.6.4 (1.20.1 version) is a remade version i'll update them and make 1.18.2 and 1.19.2 version remade

REPORT BUGS OR SOME SUGGESTIONS PLS SEND EMAIL TO z2330765441@outlook.com

THANK YOU DOWNLOAD AND PLAY THIS MOD!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Some advantages
1.We added 31 new thing.You can do something quickly

2.Our tool composition is simple！

3.It makes you better at surviving the game！

4.It supports Simplified Chinese/Traditional Chinese/English/Korean

If you want help us localize translations pls send email to z2330765441@outlook.com
